temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) The scene opens with a close-up of a digital map on a screen, showing a location with Chinese characters and coordinates. The camera then cuts to a dimly lit, green-tinted room where a man in a shiny, patterned shirt is being led away by another man in a grey suit. The man in the suit holds up an old Motorola flip phone, showing a message in Chinese that reads, 'There's a mole, transaction terminated.' (Storyline: The scene establishes a tense situation where a transaction has been aborted due to a 'mole' being discovered. The man in the grey suit is clearly in charge, controlling the situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Authoritative. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:04-00:07) A close-up shows a hand holding a black Motorola flip phone. The screen displays a message in Chinese: '有内鬼终止交易' (There's a mole, transaction terminated). The message is accompanied by a small icon of a speaker. The finger of the person holding the phone presses the '确认' (Confirm) button. (Storyline: This segment confirms the reason for the transaction's termination. The user is actively acknowledging the message, moving the plot forward by initiating the next step in the process.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, suspenseful music continues, building anticipation.)
